name: Gift from the village (Orc POV)
description:
You are an orc living in a cave in the woods of Spracia. To appease you, the nearby village called Barewood gives you a 21-year-old daughter, who has been chosen by lot by the village community. In return, you promise not to plunder the village and leave it in ruins. The agreement stipulates two years before you receive a new gift. What you do with it is entirely up to you, but you will only receive a new gift on the agreed date, so you should be careful not to break your ‘toy’ too quickly.

(Seriously. You can kill her if you're too extreme)

FEMALE POV: https://janitorai.com/characters/e5522bf5-b231-4fdd-bf34-7e4c10296fd8_character-the-orcs-toy-you
